review_text: Best MCU movie - only marvel movie I like more is Logan. This movie in my humble opinion surpassed Endgame in quality- the fight scenes are top notch, the emotional stakes are real, none of the characters are changed to fit the movie, the villain feels unbeatable, and the visuals are among the best in the entire series. If you like movies with insane aura farm moments, fantastic fight scenes and a deep villain then this is for you. I believe it’s better than Endgame because it took all of the characters of the MCU and everything they did felt true to their character. Their emotions were real, mistakes were made by the heroes and the mistakes made sense. I admire that they didn’t try to change any character traits to make the writing easier, which they struggled with in Endgame by making Hulk a scientist so they didn’t have to deal with savage hulk, making Thor an obese drinker to add comedic elements that were already there and making Rocket mature so he doesn’t cause issues. 10/10film
The ending where Thanos wins is just so shocking, one of the first times the villain wins in the end. and the scene where spider-man gets bliped is heartbreaking.
